added.description: Steve and Snot's friendship is put to the test when their mothers get in a fight.
added.title: A Roger Story

added.description: Stan takes Steve to his favorite barbershop to hang with his crew; Jeff starts journaling to help with his bad memory.
added.title: The Book of Fischer

added.description: The Aqua Teens must either escape the spider cocoons their landlord has trapped them in, or pay the rent they owe him.
added.title: Couples Skate

added.description: Master Shake's megalomania soars to new heights once he steals Frylock's laser-shooting contact lenses.
added.title: Laser Lenses

added.description: With the Aqua Teens gone, a trio of Sirens move into their house.  Their wanton songs pique Carl's attention.
added.title: Sirens
tags: aqua teen hunger force athf episode 71 sirens carl songs

added.description: When a customer leaves a $100 gift card as a tip, Bob, Linda, and the kids go on a shopping spree.
added.title: Gift Card or Buy Trying

added.description: The kids decide to run away to Europe and become ex-patriot artists, but find their plan is a little lost at sea. Back home, McGuirk's car breaks down and he has no money to fix it. He asks Tom Wilsonberg, author of "Starting Early: The New World of Corporate Kids,"for financial advice. Tom's answer? Gambling.
added.title: Stow-A-Way
tags: home movies episode 38 stow away europe coach mcguirk car broken gambling

added.description: The pressure is on when Orel needs to win this years Praying Bee.
added.title: Praying

added.description: From the minds of the writers, we see how Bear Grylls deal with some Wild Things, Dr. Ryan Stone calls a radio station, Brainy Smurf manipulates events in House of Smurfs, and Baloo discovers he hasn't always just been a bear in the jungle.
added.title: Batman Forever 21

added.description: The Robot Chicken crew lets you know if Santa Claus is a racist, Tiger Woods gets his own Space Jam type of movie and we find out what The Bratz girls did last summer.
added.title: Catdog on a Stick

added.description: The Robot Chicken writers imagine where the Velociraptors from Jurassic Park learned to be so clever, our friends from Duck Dynasty take a trip to Duckberg, and as the season comes to an end, will we see the cancellation of Robot Chicken...again?
added.title: Chipotle Miserables

added.description: Our writers unearth The Cryptkeeper to bring you three tales of terror that will haunt you for the rest of your life, the Iron Sheik makes an appearance, the Robot Chicken crew tries to come up with a Candy Crush movie, and Woody Woodpecker gets an unwanted phone call.
added.title: El Skeletorito

added.description: The Robot Chicken writers are back for Season 7! We open with a wild and crazy puppet orgy! We find out why God hates bees, a drunken visitor from Narnia comes through the wardrobe, the Dino-Riders get a rock song, and Cobra Commander joins SAG.
added.title: G.I. Gogurt

added.description: No one knows what disease Gerry injected himself with in World War Z... until the Robot Chicken writers take a crack at it! See Benjamin Franklin's greatest invention, Hannah from Girls gets a new boyfriend and we see the prequel to The Parent Trap.
added.title: Legion of Super-Gyros

added.description: The creators give us a look at what they believe is really behind Punky Brewster's Punky Power, Clarice Starling has a run-in with Multiple Miggs multiple times, and Skeletor tries to blow up Snake Mountain.
added.title: Link's Sausages

added.description: Man-E-Faces gets a shot at stardom from the minds behind Robot Chicken, the Starcom boys show NASA how it's done, we get a look at what goes on behind the scenes of Medieval Times when the costumes come off, and the consequences of wishing on a Zoltar machine.
added.title: Noidstrom Rack

added.description: The zany writers of the show put Master Chief and Cortana in an uncomfortable conversation, Drones are put into action on the G.I. Joe team, we see a few more animal totems from the Visionaries cartoon, and the little Lego folks take on some scary stuff in World War B.
added.title: Panthropologie

added.description: A dad has an uncomfortable talk with his daughter about the birds and the bees, the origin of bagpipes is revealed, and the Robot Chicken writers let the Robot Chicken Nerd take a trip into The Game of Thrones.
added.title: Rebel Appliance

added.description: The RC writers wonder what would happen if the alien from Alien was a different alien? Bert from Sesame Street gets a new roommate, we see what The Terminator would have been like as a step-dad, and Papa Smurf sees what goes on behind the scenes in Undercover Smurf.
added.title: Secret of the Booze

added.description: The RC gang thought the drift in Pacific Rim could use a little reworking, the future is revealed to kinda suck for Looney Tunes characters in Looper, Voltron gets a new number, and Skeletor takes a trip back through time to rid himself of He-Man once and for all.
added.title: Snarfer Image

added.description: The Robot Chicken writers expose the real reason why no one plays the piano in Wayne Manor.  We find out what James Potter and his friends did while in animal form, and the Disney Princesses get into a little scuffle.
added.title: Stone Cold Steve Cold Stone

added.description: Have you heard of the Boglins? The RC writers have. And they make a splash with a swamp song, we see what it's like to live the exciting life of a Lemming, Sleeping Beauty has a dream...and no one cares, and a forbidden love blossoms between Shredder and April O'Neil.
added.title: Super Guitario Center

added.description: The Creators of Robot Chicken wonder what happens when Dumbledore breaks bad, we get to see the kinds of movies Walt Disney really wanted to make, where sheep go when people are done counting them, and G.I. Joe Extreme!
added.title: The Hobbit: There and Bennigan's

added.description: Robot Chicken fan-favorite character Bitch Pudding gets her time to shine in a brand new solo special! When her fellow citizens in Pastryville get tired of suffering Bitch Pudding's abuse, they hatch a plot to eliminate her once and for all! Now Bitch Pudding will blaze a trail of raging revenge, and the world better learn how to duck and cover!

input: The Robot Chicken Bitch Pudding Special

added.title: The Robot Chicken Bitch Pudding Special

added.description: The wacky Robot Chicken writers take on every holiday that ever existed in this holiday special! We see what Mother's Day is like for the Disney characters, a talented Jewish boy raps about gelt, a young Pilgrim man has a special surprise for his family on the first Thanksgiving, and Santa has a little trouble with his neighbor up at the North Pole.

added.description: Our writers imagine how Scrooge McDuck would do on Shark Tank, Fred Flintstone gets a colonoscopy, Shrek has a moment of clarity, and Doc from Mike Tyson's Punchout passes on to the great arena in the sky.
added.title: Up Up and Buffet

added.description: From the minds of the writers, we watch as The Count from Sesame Street has a run-in with Blade, we see that McDonald's isn't just a place for eating, Jor-El has some very helpful advice for Superman, and a new nemesis comes to Gotham City.
added.title: Victoria's Secret of NIMH

added.description: The RC dreamers send Kim Possible on a mission to North Korea, worthless Beanie Babies end up turning a man's life around, and the Robot Chicken Nerd has his greatest adventure yet...with Doctor Who!
added.title: Walking Dead Lobster

removed.description: The Belchers go to a mini golf course on Thanksgiving morning.
removed.title: Putts-giving

removed.description: After a show open that features Moltar and Zorak arguing the respective merits of Beefaroni and Beefaghetti, Space Ghost enlists the Council of Doom to judge an old-fashioned cooking competition between three nationally-acclaimed culinary experts: Emeril Lagasse, Nathalie Dupree and Martin Yan.
removed.title: Cookout

removed.description: Carl's home becomes a haven for furries.
removed.title: Hoppy Bunny

removed.description: Carl's new male enhancement device produces some unsavory side effects.
removed.title: Reedickyoulus

removed.description: A kitchen fire at the Smalls is nothing compared to the flaring tempers triggered when both of Paula's newly separated parents move in. To make matters worse, Coach McGuirk volunteers to "renovate" the kitchen. Meanwhile, Brendon, Jason and Melissa make a crime drama called "Mulligan and Winooski" about two cops.

input: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

removed.description: Francine and Roger get lost in a good book (or five) after Francine escapes an embarrassing situation. Stan reluctantly hangs out at the library.
removed.title: Flush After Reading

removed.description: Stan and Francine go back in time to settle an argument.

removed.description: Orel learns about the great American pastime, discrimination.
